projects.name: open-tamil-php
projects.description:
Open Tamil PHP is here to address character encoding support for Tamil characters, fixing rendering issues in PDF and image generation, natively in PHP. 
Idea Sparked from: https://github.com/tecnickcom/TCPDF/issues/609
projects.short_description: Open Tamil is PHP Port for https://github.com/Ezhil-Language-Foundation/open-tamil/

form.question: How to support
form.response:
- Check it out, if something is missing, create an issue
 - Raise a PR
 - Create testcases. 

 All contributions are welcome.

form.question: A small brief about your project
form.response:
Open Tamil PHP is here to address character encoding support for Tamil characters, fixing rendering issues in PDF and image generation, natively in PHP.
Idea Sparked from : https://github.com/tecnickcom/TCPDF/issues/609

form.question: One FOSS maintainer lesson for your younger self
form.response: You have to wait for sometime for something. Same not applicable for everything.

form.question: Why do you do it? Why do you bother maintaining a FOSS project?
form.response: After waiting around for a solution for this problem that many faced, I decided to start addressing it by trying to fix it. One can always try at the least.

form.question: If your repo had a theme song, what would it be?
Which file in your project would you most like to set on fire?
What's your open-source villain origin story?
form.response: After wandering all around the internet, through countless forums, mailing groups and github for a fix to this PDF rendering problem, it eventually drove me to create a solution.

form.question: If you had to use one emoji to convey what it's like to be a FOSS maintainer, what would it be?
